channel.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Class-less

  • Water.css - Just-add-CSS collection of styles to make simple websites just a little nicer.
    Repostars6.2k | #CSS
  • awsm.css - CSS library for semantic HTML markup without classes, attributes, etc.
    Demo, Repostars1.3k | #SCSS

    • Base / Reset / Normalize

  • normalize.css - Modern, HTML5-ready alternative to CSS resets.
    Repostars43.6k | #CSS
  • minireset.css - Tiny modern CSS reset.
    Repostars2.3k | #Sass

    • Very Lightweight

  • Milligram - Minimalist CSS framework.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars9.3k | #Sass

    • General Purpose

  • Bootstrap - The most popular HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars149.9k | #SCSS
  • Bulma - Modern CSS framework based on Flexbox.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars43.4k | #Sass
  • Carbon Components - Component library behind IBM's Carbon Design System.
    Docs, Repostars4.3k | #SCSS
  • Base - Rock solid, responsive HTML/CSS framework.
    Docs, Repostars1.2k | #SCSS #LESS
  • Foundation - The most advanced responsive front-end framework in the world.
    Docs, Repostars29k | #SCSS

    • Material Design

  • Materialize - CSS framework based on material design.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars38.5k | #SCSS

    • Utility-based

  • Tachyons - Quickly build and design new UI without writing CSS.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars10.5k | #CSS

    • Specialized

  • Bojler - Email framework for developing responsive and lightweight email templates.
    Docs, Repostars890 | #SCSS

    • Stalled Development

  • Flexbox Grid - Grid based on CSS3 flexbox.
    Repostars9.2k
  • Basscss - Low-level CSS toolkit.
    Repostars5.6k
  • mini.css - Minimal, responsive, style-agnostic CSS framework.
    Docs, Repostars2.9k | #SCSS
  • Mobi.css - Lightweight, scalable, mobile-first CSS framework.
    Docs, Repostars2.4k | #CSS
  • Concise CSS - Give up the bloat. Stop tripping over your classes. Be concise.
    Docs, Repostars941 | #SCSS
  • Responsive Boilerplate - Powerful, accessible, developer friendly framework for building responsive websites.
    Docs, Repostars781 | #SCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Stalled Development

  • Propeller - Front-end responsive framework based on Google's Material Design standards & Bootstrap.
    Docs, Repostars1.1k | #SCSS
  • Wing - Beautiful CSS framework designed for minimalists.
    Docs, Repostars2k | #Stylus

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
General Purpose

  • Fomantic-UI - Build beautiful websites fast, with concise HTML, intuitive javascript, and simplified debugging.
    Docs, Repostars2.5k | #LESS

    • Stalled Development

  • Semantic UI - User interface is the language of the web.
    Docs, Repostars49.2k | #LESS

    • Base / Reset / Normalize

  • Natural Selection - Collection of best-practice CSS selectors.
    | #CSS

    • Specialized

  • TuiCss - Library to create MS-DOS interfaces.
    Demo, Docs | #SCSS

    • Class-less

  • MVP.css - Minimalist stylesheet for HTML elements.
    Docs, Repostars3.5k | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Base / Reset / Normalize

  • modern-css-reset - Tiny little reset that you can use as the basis of your CSS projects.
    Repostars1.8k | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2020
item.description:
Specialized

  • 98.css - CSS library for building interfaces that look like Windows 98.
    Repostars5.9k | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Class-less

  • sakura - Minimal classless CSS framework/theme.
    Demo, Repostars3k | #SCSS
  • Marx - Classless CSS reset.
    Docs, Repostars1.5k | #SCSS #Stylus
  • Tacit - CSS framework for dummies, without classes.
    Repostars1.4k | #SCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
Stalled Development

  • Neat - Lightweight and flexible Sass grid.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars4.5k | #SCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
General Purpose

  • Primer - CSS framework that powers GitHub's front-end design.
    Docs, Repostars10.2k | #SCSS
  • Blaze UI - Open source modular toolkit providing great structure for building websites quickly with a scalable and maintainable foundation.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars1.5k | #SCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Base / Reset / Normalize

  • ress - Modern CSS reset.
    Repostars1.6k | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
General Purpose

  • Cirrus - Responsive and comprehensive CSS framework with beautiful controls and simplistic structure.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars746 | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Apr 22nd - Apr 28th, 2019
item.description:
General Purpose

  • PatternFly - UI framework for enterprise web applications.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars339 | #SCSS #LESS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
General Purpose

  • turretcss - Responsive front-end framework for accessible and semantic websites.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars733 | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Feb 18th - Feb 24th, 2019
item.description:
Specialized

  • NES.css - NES-style CSS Framework.
    Demo, Docsstars17.5k, Repostars17.5k | #SCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Jan 7th - Jan 13th, 2019
item.description:
General Purpose

  • Spectre.css - Lightweight, responsive and modern CSS framework.
    Docs, Repostars10.7k | #SCSS

    • Toolkits

  • Bourbon - Lightweight Sass tool set.
    Docs, Repostars9k, Scaffold | #SCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
General Purpose

  • HiQ - Simple CSS foundation with responsive typography and input styling.
    Docs, Repostars238 | #PostCSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Aug 6th - Aug 12th, 2018
item.description:
Very Lightweight

  • Chota - Really small CSS framework.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars763 | #CSS

    • Utility-based

  • Tailwind CSS - Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development.
    Docs, Repostars41.3k | #CSS

    • Stalled Development

  • Cutestrap - Sassy, opinionated CSS framework, a tiny alternative to Bootstrap.
    Repostars1.6k

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
Very Lightweight

  • Pure - Set of small, responsive CSS modules that you can use in every web project.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars21.7k | #CSS
  • Picnic CSS - Lightweight and beautiful library.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars3.4k | #SCSS

    • General Purpose

  • UIkit - Lightweight and modular front-end framework for developing fast and powerful web interfaces.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars16.8k | #LESS #SCSS

    • Material Design

  • MUI - Lightweight CSS framework that follows Google's Material Design guidelines.
    Docs, Repostars4.4k | #SCSS

    • Stalled Development

  • unsemantic - Fluid grid for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars1.4k
  • Centurion - Web-based framework for rapid prototyping and building larger web projects.
    Docs, Repostars327

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Base / Reset / Normalize

  • modern-normalize - Normalize for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari only (no support for Edge or Internet Explorer).
    Repostars3.4k | #CSS
  • sanitize.css - The best-practices CSS foundation.
    Repostars4.3k | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Specialized

  • Tufte CSS - Style your webpage like Edward Tufte’s handouts.
    Repostars4.8k | #CSS

item.title: troxler/awesome-css-frameworks Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Base / Reset / Normalize

  • inuitcss - Extensible, scalable, Sass-based, OOCSS framework for large and long-lasting UI projects.
    Repostars1.7k | #SCSS

    • Material Design

  • Material Components Web - Modular and customizable Material Design UI components for the web.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars15.5k | #SCSS

    • Specialized

  • Gutenberg - Modern framework to print the web correctly.
    Demo, Docsstars4.4k | #SCSS
